series_metadata.series_description: Blank Answer Documents without student responses. Blank Answer documents do not contain written responses from students. The documents contain ten (10) versions of the answer documents and includes versions for the vision impaired and hearing impaired.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: five (5) years administration of answer documents. one each grade level per subject level each administration year. Review by State Archives before disposal. ; Electronic: five (5) years administration of answer documents. one each grade level per subject level each administration year. Review by State Archives before disposal
